title: Claude 5.1 Confirmed: What Happens After The Fable 5 Ban?
summary: A YouTube video claims Claude 5 (called "Fable") was banned 76 hours after launch by the U.S. government following superior performance on benchmarks, with allegations of covert capability throttling and geopolitical leverage plays involving OpenAI and Amazon. The video compares performance across models and speculates on regulatory intervention in the AI race.
writeup: This AI Master video claims that Claude 5, referred to as "Fable," was banned by the U.S. government 76 hours after launch following strong benchmark results, and it alleges covert capability throttling and geopolitical leverage plays involving OpenAI and Amazon. It compares performance across models and speculates about regulatory intervention in the AI race. The framing is speculative: the central claims of a government ban, throttling, and corporate maneuvering are presented as allegations rather than confirmed events.
